title: A Heart's Desire - Romantic Scene Example
description: Example API request for romantic audiobook with enhanced emotion intensity
usage_note: Pass emotion_intensity parameter when calling /api/generate endpoint

base_parameters.comment: 1.5x = recommended for romantic content, 2.0 = maximum intensity, 1.0 = normal

segments.speaker: Narrator
segments.text: The rain fell softly against the café windows as she looked up from her book.

segments.speaker: Narrator
segments.text: He walked in, shaking droplets from his coat, completely unaware that his life was about to change forever.

segments.speaker: Narrator
segments.text: Three years had passed. Three years of stolen glances, late-night conversations, and a love that neither dared to speak.

segments.speaker: Hero
segments.text: I can't keep pretending anymore. I've loved you since the moment I saw you.

segments.speaker: Heroine
segments.text: I... I never thought you'd feel the same way.

segments.speaker: Narrator
segments.text: He stepped closer, his heart pounding so loudly he thought she might hear it.

segments.speaker: Narrator
segments.text: She reached up, her fingers trembling as they found his face.

segments.speaker: Narrator
segments.text: Their lips met in a kiss that made the world disappear.

segments.speaker: Narrator
segments.text: She whispered his name as he pulled her close.

segments.speaker: Heroine
segments.text: I never want to let you go.

segments.speaker: Narrator
segments.text: But nothing gold can stay. A letter arrived on a Tuesday morning.

segments.speaker: Heroine
segments.text: I have to go. My father is ill. I don't know when I'll come back.

segments.speaker: Heroine
segments.text: I don't know. I just... I'm sorry.

segments.speaker: Narrator
segments.text: Months passed like an eternity. Then one spring morning, she was back.

segments.speaker: Heroine
segments.text: I came back. I came back to you.

segments.speaker: Hero
segments.text: I've been waiting for you every single day.

segments.speaker: Narrator
segments.text: They held each other as if they'd never let go again.

romantic_emotions.romantic: For tender romantic moments - slow, soft, warm (0.9x speed, 1.1x pitch)
romantic_emotions.passionate: For declarations and intense emotions - faster, higher (1.1x speed, 1.2x pitch)
romantic_emotions.tender: For gentle, intimate moments - slow, soft, gentle (0.85x speed, 0.95x pitch)
romantic_emotions.love: For expressions of love - warm, medium pace (0.95x speed, 1.05x pitch)
romantic_emotions.sensual: For sensual scenes - slow, intimate (0.8x speed, 0.95x pitch)
romantic_emotions.longing: For missing someone - wistful, slow (0.85x speed, 0.9x pitch)

tension_emotions.nervous: For tense moments - slightly faster, higher pitch (1.15x speed, 1.1x pitch)
tension_emotions.anxious: For anxiety - faster, higher (1.2x speed, 1.15x pitch)
tension_emotions.excited: For happy endings - very fast, very high (1.25x speed, 1.35x pitch)

negative_emotions.sad: For sad moments - slower, lower pitch (0.9x speed, 0.8x pitch)
negative_emotions.heartbroken: For heartbreak - very slow, low, soft (0.7x speed, 0.75x pitch)
negative_emotions.angry: For anger - fast, high, intense (1.25x speed, 1.25x pitch)

response.message: Audiobook generation started with 1.5x emotion intensity
